description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The rifle features a fixed wooden buttstock and a prominent trigger guard beneath the receiver. A telescopic scope is mounted on top of the receiver, indicating it is designed for precision shooting at distance. The barrel is slender and extends well beyond the wooden fore-end, with iron sights also visible. The magazine is internal, as there is no visible detachable box or external magazine. The overall finish is a combination of dark wood and matte black metal, giving it a traditional and robust appearance.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long black barrel, and mounted scope.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow profile with the barrel and scope aligned.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, wooden stock, mounted scope, and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wooden stock, scope, and barrel details.
